configuration.c(3) Library Functions Manual configuration.c(3)

NAME

configuration.c - Configuration file options.

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_configuration_entries []

Detailed Description

Configuration file options.

Options for loading configuration from TOML files and creating default configuration templates.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file configuration.c.

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_configuration_entries[]

Definition at line 18 of file configuration.c.

24      "",
25      0,
